hero.description: I design and ship production-ready web apps using Next.js, React, and modern backend tooling — focused on performance, clean architecture, and real-world reliability.

techStack.title: Technical Toolkit
techStack.description: Technologies I work with regularly and intentionally

projects.title: PrepAI — AI-Powered Interview Report Generator
projects.description: An AI-driven interview preparation platform that analyzes job descriptions, resumes, and user profiles to generate structured interview reports, skill gap analysis, and personalized learning roadmaps.
decisions: Designed the system to generate structured interview reports instead of raw AI output, improving usability and clarity
Separated AI generation logic into a dedicated service layer to maintain clean architecture and easier prompt iteration
Used PDF parsing to extract resume data automatically, reducing manual input friction
Modeled interview reports as persistent entities, allowing users to revisit and track preparation over time
Implemented authentication and report isolation to ensure user-specific data security
Handled AI output sanitization to prevent malformed or unsafe responses from breaking the UI
Built PDF generation pipeline for AI-enhanced resumes, dealing with headless browser constraints in production

projects.title: Trackwise — Job Tracking, Without Chaos
projects.description: A server-first job application tracking SaaS designed around real hiring workflows — not spreadsheets or vanity dashboards.
decisions: Designed the product around actions and follow-ups instead of static application lists
Kept the dashboard focused on what needs attention now, avoiding charts and metrics early on
Used server-side mutations with Next.js Server Actions for predictable data flow and security
Tracked application history as a timeline of events rather than scattered fields
Centralized validation with shared Zod schemas to prevent silent data corruption across layers

projects.title: Config-Driven Developer Portfolio
projects.description: A minimal, professional developer portfolio built as a data-driven system rather than a content-heavy website.
decisions: Made a single JSON file the source of truth so content edits never require touching JSX
Designed UI components to render data only, enforcing separation between content and presentation
Used GSAP only for subtle entrances and interaction feedback — never decorative motion
Contact Form – Server-side form validation with Arcjet security and Resend email integration

sections.title: Intentional Architecture
sections.content: Every technical decision should serve a clear purpose. I favor simple, composable systems over complex abstractions that obscure intent.

sections.title: Sustainable Code
sections.content: Code is read more often than written. I prioritize clarity and maintainability, using patterns that make the system's behavior predictable.

sections.title: Thoughtful Interaction
sections.content: Motion and animation should enhance understanding, not distract. Every transition should feel purposeful and connected to user action.

timeline.title: Independent Full-Stack Developer
timeline.description: Building production-focused full-stack applications with Next.js, React, and PostgreSQL. Emphasis on server-first architecture, schema-driven validation, and systems designed for real-world usage.

timeline.title: Frontend Development Foundations
timeline.description: Built multiple small frontend projects to solidify core concepts including component composition, state management, DOM interaction, and responsive UI patterns.

timeline.title: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA)
timeline.description: Studied computer applications with a practical focus on software fundamentals and web development. CGPA: 7.8 / 10.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.description: If you’re working on something meaningful and need a developer who cares about clarity, systems, and long-term maintainability, let’s talk.
contact.note: Messages are read carefully. If it’s a good fit, I’ll respond.
